index.description: Discover the exquisite dining experience at Le Maschou, a premier restaurant in Saudi Arabia offering a fusion of gourmet international cuisine and traditional flavors. Indulge in carefully crafted dishes made from the freshest ingredients, served in a luxurious and welcoming ambiance. Whether for an intimate dinner or a special celebration, Le Maschou promises an unforgettable culinary journey in the heart of Riyadh. Reserve your table today and elevate your dining experience.

venuePage.firstAboutText: Le Maschou was born in 1963 by the founding duo, Jean Biraly and Gerard Fery, who worked fervently to exemplify a high-end quality epicurean experience derived from both excellent tastes, and elegance and panache of medieval France.
venuePage.secondAboutText: Your experience at Le Maschou begins as soon as you set foot in our location. You will be welcomed by the soft crackling and earthy freshness of our open woo-fire, complemented with ambient music, intimately designed to settle you in. The old fashioned cosiness of Maschou's stone walls is inspired by the historical patterns of old-world charm.
